title: Patient books an appointment successfully
description: An authenticated patient can complete the booking flow and receive confirmation that the appointment was created.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a patient user
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the appointment booking page
Select a specialty
Select a doctor
Fill a valid date into the date field
Select an available time slot
Submit the booking form
Verify a booking confirmation is visible
Verify the new appointment is shown in the patient's upcoming appointments context

title: Log in as a patient and reach the patient dashboard
description: This verifies that a returning patient can sign in with valid credentials and is routed to the patient dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the patient dashboard is displayed

title: Log in as a doctor and reach the doctor dashboard
description: This verifies that a returning doctor can sign in with valid credentials and is routed to the doctor dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the doctor dashboard is displayed

title: Doctor completes the full queue status flow
description: A doctor can mark a patient arrived, start the consultation, and complete the visit in sequence.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a doctor user
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the queue management page
Mark a patient as arrived
Start the consultation for that patient
Mark the patient as completed
Verify the patient's status is shown as completed
Verify the updated queue state is displayed

title: Log in as an admin and reach the admin dashboard
description: This verifies that a returning admin can sign in with valid credentials and is routed to the admin dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed

title: Register a new patient and reach the patient dashboard
description: This verifies that a new patient can create an account and is routed to the patient dashboard after registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill in the name field with a new patient name
Fill in the email field with a unique email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the registration form
Verify the patient dashboard is displayed

title: Patient logs in and opens the live queue view
description: An authenticated patient can log in and reach the live queue screen where their current queue position and wait-time context are shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a patient user
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the live queue view
Verify the live queue screen is displayed
Verify the current wait-time and queue position are displayed

title: Book an appointment as a patient
description: This verifies that a logged-in patient can complete the booking flow by choosing a specialty, doctor, date, and available time slot and successfully create an appointment.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to book a new appointment
Select a specialty
Select a doctor
Pick a valid date
Select an available time slot
Submit the booking form
Verify a booking confirmation is visible
Verify the new appointment is displayed in the patient experience

title: Doctor logs in and opens the queue list
description: An authenticated doctor can log in and reach today’s queue list with patient entries available for management.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a doctor user
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the queue management page
Verify the doctor queue list is displayed
Verify patient entries in today's queue are displayed

title: Monitor live queue status and wait time
description: This verifies that a patient can open live queue monitoring and see the current queue position and estimated wait time.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open live queue monitoring
Verify the live queue snapshot is displayed
Verify the estimated wait time is displayed

title: Reach the doctor queue and update a patient's status through the visit
description: This verifies that a doctor can open the queue, mark a patient arrived, start the consultation, complete the visit, and save notes.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the doctor queue
Mark a patient as arrived
Start the consultation for that patient
Complete the visit for that patient
Add consultation notes
Save the consultation notes
Verify the patient visit reflects the completed status
Verify the consultation notes are displayed

title: Admin logs in and opens the analytics dashboard
description: An authenticated admin can log in and view the operational analytics dashboard with global queue metrics.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the admin dashboard
Verify the analytics dashboard is displayed
Verify global queue metrics are displayed

title: Review admin analytics and global queue monitor
description: This verifies that an admin can open analytics and queue monitoring and see the platform’s operational summaries.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the admin dashboard
Click the link to open global queue monitoring
Verify the analytics dashboard is displayed
Verify the global queue metrics are displayed

title: Patient sees live queue progress update
description: A patient viewing the live queue can observe that queue progress updates change their displayed position or wait-time context.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a patient user
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the live queue view
Wait for the live queue status to refresh
Verify the queue position or wait-time display updates
Verify the live queue screen remains displayed

title: See a booked appointment in patient history
description: This verifies that after booking an appointment, the patient can open appointment history and see the new appointment reflected there.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to view appointment history
Verify the appointment history is displayed
Verify the newly booked appointment is listed

title: Admin reviews operational insights and queue monitoring
description: An admin can move between the main dashboard and queue monitoring view to review system-wide operations.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the admin dashboard
Click the link to open the queue monitoring page
Verify the global queue monitoring view is displayed
Verify queue metrics remain visible

title: Patient booking appears in appointment history
description: After booking an appointment, a patient can open appointment history and see the newly created visit listed there.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a patient user
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the appointment booking page
Select a specialty
Select a doctor
Fill a valid date into the date field
Select an available time slot
Submit the booking form
Click the link to open appointment history
Verify the newly created appointment is listed in history
Verify the appointment history view is displayed

title: Review doctor appointments and add consultation notes
description: This verifies that a doctor can open their appointments page, view scheduled appointments, and record notes for a visit.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to view doctor appointments
Open an appointment
Add consultation notes
Save the consultation notes
Verify the appointment details are displayed
Verify the consultation notes are displayed

title: Doctor adds consultation notes for a patient
description: A doctor can record consultation notes from the queue management experience and see them associated with the patient.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a doctor user
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the queue management page
Select a patient from the queue
Add consultation notes
Save the consultation notes
Verify the consultation notes are displayed for the patient
Verify the patient record remains visible in the queue context

title: Admin opens the doctor management page
description: An authenticated admin can reach the doctor management page from the admin area and view the doctor list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for an admin user
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the doctor management page
Verify the doctor management view is displayed
Verify the list of doctors is displayed

title: Manage doctors from the admin doctors page
description: This verifies that an admin can open the doctors management page and see the doctor list available for administration.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to manage doctors
Verify the doctors management page is displayed
Verify the doctor list is displayed

title: Block unauthorized access to patient pages
description: This verifies that a user who is not signed in cannot access patient-protected pages and is redirected to sign in.

steps.description: Navigate to /patient
Verify access is redirected away from the patient page
Verify the login page is displayed

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: This verifies that entering invalid credentials prevents sign-in and shows an error message.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with an incorrect password
Submit the login form
Verify a login error message is visible

title: Patient sees validation when booking details are incomplete
description: A patient who tries to submit an incomplete booking sees validation feedback and no appointment is created.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a patient user
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the appointment booking page
Submit the booking form without completing required details
Verify booking validation feedback is visible
Verify no new appointment confirmation is shown

title: Prevent booking when required selections are incomplete
description: This verifies that the patient booking form requires the necessary selections before an appointment can be created.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to book a new appointment
Submit the booking form without completing all required fields
Verify booking validation errors are visible

title: Doctor sees the queue in an empty state
description: When the doctor queue has no active patients, the queue view shows an empty state instead of a patient list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the login credentials for a doctor user
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the queue management page
Verify an empty queue message is visible
Verify no patient entries are displayed
